HTTP/transport concerns isolated in client.py; rendering pure in formatting.py
server.py re-exports prior public names so consumer API stays stable

evidence: Tool inventory rationale documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — keeping 4 search tools separate is an intentional LLM-ergonomics choice

Tools remain under the 10-15 budget threshold (7 total)
Helpers in formatting.py composable and reused across tools
Tools themselves atomic — each does one Discovery/Persons API call
Composability stronger after the split (client.py / formatting.py separation)
7 @mcp.tool functions, 2 @mcp.resource endpoints, 2 @mcp.prompt workflows

Tradeoff acknowledged and documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — Markdown returns are the most reliable LLM-consumption format today; switching to structured returns is a breaking change deferred to v1.0
Provenance (CH-004 Quelle: line) is preserved without needing structured fields
gaps: Will be revisited before the 1.0 release — tracked as planned work, not a current gap
